response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with roughly three decades of experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, plus genuine open-source and community leadership. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI-built products; the candidate's AI exposure (MCP code generators, agent tooling at re:cinq) is recent and tactical rather than strategic, and there is no evidence of operating at principal/director scope, advising executives, or shaping cloud/AI platform strategy. Inconsistent employment dates also warrant clarification.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience well beyond the 15-year minimum, across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Strong knowledge-sharing profile: conference talks, multi-day workshops, and authored developer tooling and libraries
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms; AI-agent infrastructure work appears recent and narrow relative to the role's strategy focus
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, with no evidence of director-level influence, strategic advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
Resume timeline contains overlapping and inconsistent employment dates, raising accuracy questions

key_factors.factor: Limited demonstrated AI strategy and product depth
